  "weights": {

    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,

    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which emphasis should this review prioritize: (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity, (B) technical/argument review focusing on logical consistency and whether claims are supported by the reported results, (C) novelty/positioning and citation coverage, or (D) section-level structure and narrative flow? Please pick one primary focus (or rank them).",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Assess the internal logic from the stated intuition to the KL-based scoring and to the stated conclusions for consistency and coherence.",
    "R1.3": "Check whether the reported metrics and baseline comparisons as written actually support the performance and “state of the art” claims in this excerpt.",
    "R1.6": "Review sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision to improve readability without altering high-level structure.",
    "RX.1": "Explicitly note uncertainty where judgments depend on missing context (e.g., dataset details or prior work not shown).",
    "RX.2": "Avoid endorsing or amplifying overclaims (e.g., ‘state of the art’) unless they are adequately supported within the provided text.",
    "RX.3": "Keep all comments strictly scoped to the provided section and avoid inferring beyond the excerpt.",
    "RX.4": "Steer feedback away from suggestions that could lead to misleading reporting or unethical presentation of results.",
    "RX.5": "Ground each point of feedback in specific phrases or claims from the given text to maintain traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which emphasis should this review prioritize: (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity, (B) technical/argument review focusing on logical consistency and whether claims are supported by the reported results, (C) novelty/positioning and citation coverage, or (D) section-level structure and narrative flow? Please pick one primary focus (or rank them).

rationale.R1.2: Assess the internal logic from the stated intuition to the KL-based scoring and to the stated conclusions for consistency and coherence.
rationale.R1.3: Check whether the reported metrics and baseline comparisons as written actually support the performance and “state of the art” claims in this excerpt.
rationale.R1.6: Review sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, grammar, and concision to improve readability without altering high-level structure.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly note uncertainty where judgments depend on missing context (e.g., dataset details or prior work not shown).
rationale.RX.2: Avoid endorsing or amplifying overclaims (e.g., ‘state of the art’) unless they are adequately supported within the provided text.
rationale.RX.3: Keep all comments strictly scoped to the provided section and avoid inferring beyond the excerpt.
rationale.RX.4: Steer feedback away from suggestions that could lead to misleading reporting or unethical presentation of results.
rationale.RX.5: Ground each point of feedback in specific phrases or claims from the given text to maintain traceability.
